visual_description: A man in a brown suit and glasses stands in a dimly lit parking garage at night, smiling faintly. He is approached by another man in a dark suit who is mostly in shadow. The man in the suit extends his hand, and the man in the brown suit looks down at it before looking back up with a slight smile.
audio_description: A low, ominous musical score plays in the background. A male voice speaks in a calm, measured tone.
